title: Long Bean Blanquette
description: A simple and flavorful French-inspired dish featuring long beans in a creamy sauce.
instructions: In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the sesame oil and cook for 1 minute.
Add the long beans and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the flour and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add the chicken broth, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, about 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
